# Pull Request

## Linked Issue

State the issue ID or URL.

## Outcome

State the concrete artifact or decision this pull request changes.

## Evidence

List evidence IDs, source URLs, source dates, and access dates.

## Validation

```bash
pnpm build
pnpm validate
pnpm reproducibility:check
```

## Safety And Limitations

Name the safety risk, known limitations, and reviewer role needed.

## Done Condition

State what evidence proves this pull request is review-complete.
